violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed cases of food product stored on the floor in the walk in freezer at time of inspection.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. F'real machine had build up on the blender part of the machine.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed food items stored on the floor in freezer and walk in cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Spoons, spatulas, etc were not inverted or covered during storage.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Roast beef, opened containers of potato salad and more in freezers, walk in coolers and refrigerator were not labeled nor dated.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observe Caffeine drink machine contained black substance in ice chute. Spouts on the drinks needed cleaning.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used in the buckets used for wiping tables, counters. etc. There was no sanitizer in bucket.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items stored on the floor.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Employee bathroom did not have a self closing door.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pts deducted)
